title: Tech
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Tech, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: African defensetech Terra Industries, founded by two Gen Zers, raises additional $22M in a month
items.description: Terra Industries, the African defense company, announced Monday that it had secured an additional $22 million in funding to further expand the busines...

items.title: Blackstone backs Neysa in up to $1.2B financing as India pushes to build domestic AI infrastructure
items.description: Neysa is targeting deployments of more than 20,000 GPUs over time as demand for local AI compute accelerates.

items.title: As AI data centers hit power limits, Peak XV backs Indian startup C2i to fix the bottleneck
items.description: C2i has raised $15 million as it tests a grid-to-GPU approach to reducing power losses in AI data centers.

items.title: India has 100M weekly active ChatGPT users, Sam Altman says
items.description: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman says India has the largest number of student users of ChatGPT worldwide.

items.title: The enterprise AI land grab is on. Glean is building the layer beneath the interface.
items.description: In this week's episode of the Equity podcast, Glean CEO Arvind Jain explains the company's shift from enterprise search tool to middleware layer for e...

items.title: Anthropic and the Pentagon are reportedly arguing over Claude usage
items.description: The apparent issue: whether Claude can be used for mass domestic surveillance and autonomous weapons.

items.title: Longtime NPR host David Greene sues Google over NotebookLM voice
items.description: The longtime host of NPR’s “Morning Edition,” is suing Google, alleging that the male podcast voice in the company’s NotebookLM tool is based on him.

items.title: OpenClaw creator Peter Steinberger joins OpenAI
items.description: OpenAI said OpenClaw will live on as an open source project.
